title: SimpleForm Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for SimpleForm usage in Rails applications

commands.description: Add SimpleForm gem to your Gemfile
commands.scenario: Add SimpleForm gem to your Gemfile

commands.description: Install SimpleForm with default bootstrap configuration
commands.scenario: Install SimpleForm with default bootstrap configuration

commands.command:
<%= simple_form_for @user do |f| %>
  <%= f.input :username %>
  <%= f.input :email %>
  <%= f.button :submit %>
<% end %>
commands.description: Create a simple form for a User model
commands.scenario: Create a simple form for a User model

commands.description: Add a custom error message to a field
commands.scenario: Add a custom error message to a field

commands.command:
en:
  simple_form:
    labels:
      user:
        email: 'Your Email'
    placeholders:
      user:
        email: 'example@example.com'
